objective: Win the Indianapolis 500 through class-leading pace, pit execution, race strategy, and reliability.

key_results.text: Reduce drag area (CdA) by 3% and increase T1/T3 corner-exit speed by +3 mph to achieve ≥ 0.20 sec/lap faster average green-flag pace vs field median.
key_results.baseline: CdA: 1.00 m^2 (Wind tunnel, A2 facility, 2025-03-05); T1/T3 exit speed: 216 mph (IMS test telemetry, 2025-04-15); green-flag pace: +0.12 sec/lap slower than field median (IndyCar timing, 2024).
key_results.target: CdA ≤ 0.97 m^2; T1/T3 exit speed ≥ 219 mph; average green-flag pace ≥ 0.20 sec/lap faster than field median (top-quartile).

key_results.text: Achieve pit-stop performance: median ≤ 6.8s, 90th percentile ≤ 7.2s; pit-stop error rate ≤ 2%.
key_results.baseline: Median: 7.8s; 90th percentile: 8.4s; error rate: 6% (PitOps v3.2 logs, 2024 season; errors include wheel-nut, fuel, jack, unsafe releases).

key_results.text: Improve reliability: mean laps between critical mechanical failures (engine, gearbox, fuel, suspension) ≥ 800; zero mechanical DNF.
key_results.baseline: MTBF: 520 laps; mechanical DNFs: 1 (Telemetry + maintenance logs, 2024 season).

key_results.text: Race strategy outcomes: qualify ≤ P4; average green-flag stint pace ≤ +0.10 sec/lap vs top-3 median; tire degradation ≤ 0.05 sec/lap over 20-lap stints.
key_results.baseline: Qualifying: P12; stint pace: +0.35 sec/lap vs top-3 median; degradation: 0.12 sec/lap over 20 laps (IMS 2024 data, IndyCar timing + telemetry).
key_results.target: Qualifying position ≤ P4; stint pace ≤ +0.10 sec/lap vs top-3 median; degradation ≤ 0.05 sec/lap over 20 laps.

key_results.text: Governance, dependencies, and monitoring: publish weekly performance dashboards and complete biweekly review gates; secure 12 wind-tunnel sessions; finalize RACI and escalation path; lock supplier lead times ≤ 10 days with contingency stock for top-5 failure modes; budget/staffing 100% approved; risk register and contingency plan approved.
key_results.baseline: Dashboards: none; reviews: ad hoc; wind-tunnel sessions booked: 8; RACI: 60% draft; escalation path: undefined; supplier lead times: 14–21 days; contingency stock: 2 of top-5 parts; budget/staffing: 80% approved (Ops reports, 2024).
key_results.target: Weekly dashboards published; 100% of biweekly review gates executed; 12 wind-tunnel sessions booked; RACI finalized; escalation path documented; supplier lead times ≤ 10 days; contingency stock in place for top-5 parts; budget/staffing 100% approved; risk register and contingency plan approved.
key_results.deadline: By Pre-Season Start and maintained through Race Day
